nodes.name: bz-auth-magic-link
nodes.notes: Receives { email }. Upserts user, generates magic token, sends email, responds.

nodes.name: Upsert User

parameters.query: INSERT INTO users (email, magic_token, magic_token_expires, updated_at) VALUES ($1, $2, NOW() + INTERVAL '15 minutes', NOW()) ON CONFLICT (email) DO UPDATE SET magic_token = $2, magic_token_expires = NOW() + INTERVAL '15 minutes', updated_at = NOW() RETURNING id, email, name

nodes.notes: Postgres v2.5 parameterized — safe from injection

parameters.subject: Your Broodz login link
parameters.html:
Click the link below to sign in to Broodz:

Sign in to Broodz

This link expires in 15 minutes.

nodes.name: bz-auth-verify
nodes.notes: Receives { token }. Validates magic token, generates JWT, creates talent stub if needed.

parameters.query: UPDATE users SET magic_token = NULL, magic_token_expires = NULL, jwt_token = $2, updated_at = NOW() WHERE magic_token = $1 AND magic_token_expires > NOW() RETURNING id, email, name

nodes.name: Create Talent Stub

parameters.query: INSERT INTO talents (user_id, name, slug) VALUES ($1, $2, $3) ON CONFLICT (user_id) DO NOTHING

nodes.notes: Creates a minimal talent profile on first login
